title: trifolium alpinum
intro: Trifolium alpinum, also known as Alpine Clover or Alpine Clover Trefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and trifoliate leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Trifolium alpinum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. Trifolium alpinum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
